scripts.stop: sh -c 'for p in 7100 7001 7000 3000 5173; do lsof -ti tcp:$p | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; done'
scripts.dev: npm run stop && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @invest/api && npm run build -w @invest/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @invest/api && npm run typecheck -w @invest/web
